mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, B.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId,
NVL(M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음') AS writerNickname,
AT.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, PAT.ANIMAL_ID AS parentAnimalId, PAT.ANIMAL_NAME AS parentAnimalName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS commentCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS imageCount,
( SELECT IMAGE_URL FROM ( SELECT BI.IMAGE_URL FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ORDER BY BI.IMAGE_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS thumbnailUrl,
( SELECT LINK_URL FROM ( SELECT BI.LINK_URL FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ORDER BY BI.IMAGE_ID ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS linkUrl
FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT ON B.ANIMAL_ID = AT.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE PAT ON AT.PARENT_ID = PAT.ANIMAL_ID
WHERE B.BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType}
AND B.ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId}
AND ( B.ANIMAL_ID = #{parentAnimalId} OR B.ANIMAL_ID IN ( SELECT ANIMAL_ID FROM ANIMAL_TYPE WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentAnimalId} ) )
ORDER BY B.BOARD_ID DESC

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, B.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, B.BOARD_TYPE AS boardType, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, B.HIT AS hit, B.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, B.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, B.ANIMAL_ID AS animalId,
NVL(M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음') AS writerNickname,
AT.ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, PAT.ANIMAL_ID AS parentAnimalId, PAT.ANIMAL_NAME AS parentAnimalName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS commentCount,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE BI WHERE BI.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID ) AS imageCount
FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON B.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE AT ON B.ANIMAL_ID = AT.ANIMAL_ID LEFT JOIN ANIMAL_TYPE PAT ON AT.PARENT_ID = PAT.ANIMAL_ID
WHERE B.BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, ANIMAL_ID ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{animalId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )

INSERT INTO BOARD_IMAGE ( IMAGE_ID, BOARD_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVED_NAME, IMAGE_URL, LINK_URL ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_IMAGE.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{originalName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{savedName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT IMAGE_ID AS imageId, BOARD_ID AS boardId, ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalName, SAVED_NAME AS savedName, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, LINK_URL AS linkUrl, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM BOARD_IMAGE WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY IMAGE_ID ASC
SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category, PARENT_ID AS parentId FROM ANIMAL_TYPE WHERE PARENT_ID IS NULL ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID ASC
SELECT ANIMAL_ID AS animalId, ANIMAL_NAME AS animalName, CATEGORY AS category, PARENT_ID AS parentId FROM ANIMAL_TYPE WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} ORDER BY ANIMAL_ID ASC

SELECT BC.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, BC.BOARD_ID AS boardId, BC.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BC.CONTENT AS content, BC.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, BC.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, NVL(M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음') AS writerNickname, M.ROLE AS writerRole FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON BC.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE BC.BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY BC.COMMENT_ID ASC

SELECT BC.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, BC.BOARD_ID AS boardId, BC.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, BC.CONTENT AS content, BC.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, BC.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, NVL(M.NICKNAME, '알 수 없음') AS writerNickname, M.ROLE AS writerRole FROM BOARD_COMMENT BC LEFT JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON BC.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID WHERE BC.COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT ( COMMENT_ID, BOARD_ID, MEMBER_ID, CONTENT ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_COMMENT.NEXTVAL, #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{content} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD_COMMENT SET CONTENT =#{content}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId}
UPDATE BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content, jdbcType =CLOB}, ANIMAL_ID = #{animalId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
